// Why VOX

Why You Should Join

🎮
Game Nights

3–4 custom game nights every week. Competitive, casual, or chaotic — there's always a lobby waiting.

🧠
Experienced Players

Seasoned players who are genuinely happy to help you improve. New or grinding ranked — we've got you covered.

🪙
VOX Coins Economy

Earn coins for everything you do — playing, winning, showing up. Your effort doesn't disappear, it stacks.

🎥
Streams & Content

An active community that creates. Live streams, highlights, memes — VOX is always making noise.

😂
Memes & Community

We don't take ourselves too seriously. Come for the games, stay for the chaos. The server is actually fun.

⚔️
Tournaments

Stake VOX Coins, win big. Fun game modes with real stakes.

Coming at 100 Members

// Game Nights

How Game Nights Work

Custom games 3–4 times a week. Open to everyone — no skill requirement, just show up.

📅
How to Sign Up

Events are posted in Discord. Click Interested on the event to register. No invite needed — just show up when it starts.

🏆
Winning Rewards

Win a game night and earn 20 VOX Coins × players in the lobby. A 20-player game pays out 400 coins to the winner.

// Tournaments

Tournaments

Tournaments are coming to VOX — custom game modes, VOX Coin stakes, and serious competition. We're building this out and it launches once we hit 100 members.

Currently at 77 members — almost there.

// Economy

VOX Coins

Your activity, wins, and time in VOX aren't just moments — they're currency. Earn coins, reflect your rank, spend on in-game skins.

🪙 NOW LIVE
// How to Earn
💤
Passive Income

Earn daily based on your role. Collect with !collect in 🪙vox-coins.

🏆
Game Night Wins

Win a game night: earn 20 coins × every player in the lobby.

⚔️
Tournaments

Stake coins and win 10× your entry. Free to enter.

💬
Chat Activity

Stay active in the server. Being present gets rewarded.

🎲
Gambling

Up to 5 bets/day, max 100 coins/bet in 🪙vox-coins.

🛍️
Buy Skins

Spend VOX Coins on in-game skins. Coming soon.

// Joining VOX

How to Join VOX

No requirements — VOX is open to everyone. Just follow these steps in Discord.

01
Join VOX In-Game

Join the VOX clan on openfront.io and note your player ID. You'll need both when heading to Discord.

02
Submit a Join Request

Go to the join request channel and provide your player ID. No skill test, no tryout — that's it.

03
General Inquiries

Have a question or need to report something? Use the general inquiry channel and someone will get back to you.

04
Request a Role

Met the requirements for a rank? Submit a role request — FFA win milestones, inviting 3+ people for VOX Recruiter, being top 3 active for VOX Supporter, or anything else role-related.

// The Founders

Built by Two,
Powered by Many.

VOX was born from a vision — Valentino and Crescent set out to build the most iconic clan in OpenFront, and the community did the rest.

Valentino
Co-Founder · Leader

The face of VOX. Valentino brought the vision and energy that turned an idea into one of OpenFront's fastest growing clans. His cat? Iconic.

Crescent
Co-Founder · Leader

The crescent to Valentino's chaos. Crescent keeps VOX running with structure, strategy, and the calm energy that holds a clan together.

Ready to Join VOX?

No requirements. Just show up, play, and become part of something real.
